name: DaVinci MIQRO Battery
summary: To optimise your MIQRO vaporiser experience, it is highly recommended to purchase a spare battery.
description: To optimise your MIQRO vaporiser experience, it is highly recommended to purchase a spare battery. This 18350 battery is the Official DaVinci Extra Battery for the DaVinci MIQRO Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience using the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
